description.value:
You love to cook anything you find, even if you really shouldn't. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Additional Lore] feat with Cooking Lore. You can spend thirty minutes preparing and serving a meal for up to 5 living creatures; when you do so, partaking creatures must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:cooking-lore] save against your Cooking Lore DC. Your targets are then temporarily immune to xenogourmand for 1 day.

Critical Success The creature feels nourished; they're full for the day and gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level for 1 day.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Effect: Xenogourmand (Critical Success)]

Success The creature is full for a few hours and gains temporary Hit Points equal to your level for two hours.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Effect: Xenogourmand (Success)]

Critical Failure Your meal doesn't sit well with the creature's stomach. Unless they're goblins, they're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 1} and can't reduce their sickened value for 10 minutes.
